items.definition_en: A person who arranges and cuts film shots together.
items.example_en: The film editor worked late to finish the final version.

items.definition_en: A person who shows people to their seats in a cinema.
items.example_en: The usher guided us to the correct row.

items.definition_en: A large printed picture used to advertise a movie.
items.example_en: The new movie poster was hung in the lobby.

items.definition_en: A person who reviews and writes about movies.
items.example_en: The film critic gave the movie a positive review.

items.definition_en: The first official public showing of a movie.
items.example_en: The movie premiere attracted many celebrities.

items.definition_en: A very successful and popular movie.
items.example_en: That superhero film became a summer blockbuster.

items.definition_en: A series of related movies about the same characters.
items.example_en: The movie franchise released its fifth film this year.

items.definition_en: A short role by a famous person in a movie.
items.example_en: She made a guest appearance as herself in the comedy.

items.definition_en: A person who performs dangerous scenes instead of an actor.
items.example_en: The stunt double jumped from the moving car.

items.definition_en: A particular type or style of movie.
items.example_en: Comedy is my favorite movie genre.

items.definition_en: A list of people who worked on a movie shown at the end.
items.example_en: We stayed to watch all the credits after the film.

items.definition_en: Techniques used to create illusions in movies.
items.example_en: The special effects made the monsters look real.

items.definition_en: An organized event where many movies are shown and judged.
items.example_en: He won an award at a famous film festival.

items.definition_en: A person who loves and knows many movies.
items.example_en: My brother is a real movie buff.

items.definition_en: The place where movie tickets are sold or the money made by a film.
items.example_en: The film broke box office records last weekend.

items.definition_en: A place where a movie is filmed outside the studio.
items.example_en: They traveled to Italy for the shooting location.

items.definition_en: A movie show that takes place in the daytime.
items.example_en: We decided to go to the matinee on Sunday.

items.definition_en: A person who often goes to the cinema.
items.example_en: Every Friday, the moviegoer watches the latest films.

items.definition_en: An object used by actors during a movie.
items.example_en: The sword is the hero's main prop in the film.

items.definition_en: A board used to mark scenes and synchronize sound in filming.
items.example_en: The clapperboard was snapped before every scene.
